hero.title: Hanstone Quartz — Created by Earth. Designed for You.
hero.tagline: The official South Florida distributor of Hanstone Quartz by Hyundai L&C.

story.label: OUR HERITAGE
story.title: The Hanstone Story
story.text1: Since 2009, Hanstone has been crafting premium quartz surfaces using advanced Breton™ technology. Made from 93% natural quartz, every slab delivers unmatched durability and beauty.
story.text2: Manufactured in state-of-the-art facilities with rigorous quality control, Hanstone surfaces meet the highest standards of craftsmanship and sustainability.

card1.title: Harder Than Granite
card1.desc: Made from 93% natural quartz, Hanstone surfaces are exceptionally durable and resistant to scratches and chips.

card2.title: Never Needs Sealing
card2.desc: Unlike natural stone, Hanstone quartz requires zero sealing — ever. Simply clean and enjoy.

card3.title: Non-Porous & Hygienic
card3.desc: The non-porous surface resists bacteria, stains, and mold. NSF certified for food preparation.

card4.title: Lifetime Warranty
card4.desc: Every Hanstone surface comes with a residential lifetime limited warranty for your peace of mind.

resources.label: FOR PROFESSIONALS
resources.title: Professional Resources
resources.desc: Everything you need for your next project — from technical specifications to continuing education.

cad.desc: Access AutoCAD drawings and detail files for precise project planning.

ceu.desc: Earn continuing education credits through Hanstone-certified courses.

specs.desc: Complete technical data and performance specifications for every Hanstone color.

care.desc: Best practices for keeping your Hanstone surfaces looking beautiful for a lifetime.

hero.title: Lucciare — The Art of Marbleized Veining
hero.tagline: Handcrafted quartz surfaces with Italian-inspired design and uncompromising quality.

story.label: OUR HERITAGE
story.title: The Lucciare Story
story.text1: Lucciare combines Italian artistry with advanced engineering to create quartz surfaces that capture the beauty of natural marble with superior performance.
story.text2: Each slab is handcrafted to achieve unique veining patterns, ensuring no two surfaces are exactly alike.

genesis.label: THE GENESIS COLLECTION
genesis.title: Genesis — Where It All Begins
genesis.text1: The Genesis Collection represents the foundation of Lucciare's artistry — timeless designs inspired by the world's most coveted natural marbles.
genesis.text2: Each surface in the Genesis Collection is crafted to capture the essence of natural stone while delivering the performance and consistency of engineered quartz.

card1.title: Italian-Inspired Design
card1.desc: Each surface is crafted with meticulous attention to detail, capturing the essence of natural marble veining.

card2.title: GreenGuard Gold Certified
card2.desc: Meets the world's most rigorous chemical emissions standards for healthier indoor environments.

card3.title: Stain-Resistant & Durable
card3.desc: Non-porous surface resists stains, scratches, and heat — built for everyday life.

card4.title: Quality Guaranteed
card4.desc: Backed by comprehensive warranty coverage for residential and commercial installations.

cta.title: Ready to see Lucciare in person?
cta.desc: Visit our showroom to experience the full Lucciare collection. Touch, feel, and compare every design.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: South Florida's trusted stone distributor since 2016.

2016.title: Founded in Doral
2016.desc: The Stone Surfaces opens its first showroom in Doral, Florida, with a vision to provide premium stone surfaces to South Florida.

2018.title: Growing Our Collection
2018.desc: Expanded inventory to over 200 slab varieties, establishing partnerships with quarries worldwide.

2020.title: Industry Recognition
2020.desc: Named one of South Florida's top stone distributors, serving over 100 fabricators and designers.

2022.title: Showroom Expansion
2022.desc: Renovated and expanded our Doral showroom to showcase 500+ slab varieties in a premium setting.

2024.title: Multi-Location Growth
2024.desc: Opened new showrooms in Orlando and Sarasota to serve clients across Florida.

2026.title: Hanstone Partnership
2026.desc: Became the official South Florida distributor of Hanstone Quartz by Hyundai L&C and Lucciare Handcrafted Quartz.

mission.label: OUR VALUES
mission.title: Our Mission & Values
mission.desc: Three pillars guide everything we do — from selecting the finest slabs to delivering exceptional service.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We inspect every slab to ensure it meets our exacting standards before it reaches your project.

service.title: Service
service.desc: Expert guidance from selection to installation. Our team is here to help at every step.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Transparent pricing, honest advice, and genuine partnerships with every client.

roberto.bio: With over 15 years in the stone industry, Roberto founded The Stone Surfaces with a vision of bringing premium surfaces to South Florida.

isabella.bio: Isabella oversees daily operations and ensures every client receives the highest level of service and support.

marcus.bio: Marcus brings deep industry knowledge and a passion for helping clients find the perfect surface for their projects.

sofia.bio: Sofia helps architects and designers select materials that bring their creative visions to life.

carlos.bio: Carlos manages our 50,000 sq ft facility and ensures every slab is stored, handled, and delivered with care.

ana.bio: Ana drives brand awareness and connects The Stone Surfaces with professionals and homeowners across Florida.

david.bio: David is the dedicated point of contact for our trade professionals, providing priority support and exclusive services.

elena.bio: Elena ensures every touchpoint — from first visit to final installation — exceeds client expectations.
